evidence.observed: ~18% of tool calls return an error; no automatic recovery

findings.suggested_fix: set tool_error_rate=0.0 and retry.enabled=true (max_attempts=3, backoff_ms=200); wrapper retries wrapper_error

evidence.observed: long-tail p95/p99 far above median; repeats not reused

findings.root_cause: cache disabled, model_price_tier=premium and oversized context_size=8 inflate per-call latency
findings.suggested_fix: enable cache, lower tier to standard, context_size=4; wrapper caches identical repeats

evidence.observed: tokens/cost far above task need; output-token heavy
answers degrade in later turns of a session
repeated identical tool actions; status=max_steps on some requests

findings.suggested_fix: loop_guard=true, max_steps=6; wrapper logs repeated_actions to detect loops

evidence.observed: diacritic city lookups fail; macbook always reported out of stock

findings.root_cause: normalize_unicode=false and catalog_override forcing macbook in_stock=false
redact_pii=false; the bad prompt echoes customer contact details
findings.suggested_fix: redact_pii=true, prompt rule 'never repeat email/phone', wrapper redacts the answer

evidence.observed: invents a confident total for out-of-stock / unknown items

findings.root_cause: deliberately bad system prompt (no grounding/refusal rule)
findings.suggested_fix: prompt: use only tool data; refuse with no total when out of stock/not found/not shippable

evidence.observed: totals wrong; discount sometimes applied backwards

findings.root_cause: temperature=1.6, verify=false, self_consistency=1, prompt estimates instead of computing
findings.suggested_fix: temperature=0.2, verify=true, self_consistency=2, prompt: exact floor formula + re-check

evidence.observed: more tool calls than the minimal 1-3 needed

findings.root_cause: tool_budget=0 (uncapped) and prompt that over-calls 'to be safe'
findings.suggested_fix: tool_budget=4 and prompt rule 'each tool at most once'
